query:
INSERT INTO cancelled_skus (style, colour, leather, cancelledAt)
VALUES 
  ('FAVE', 'CHOC', 'VINTAGE', NOW()),
  ('MAMZELLE', 'BLACK', 'NAPPA', NOW()),
  ('MAMZELLE', 'PERU', 'NAPPA', NOW()),
  ('MAMZELLE', 'DOVE', 'NAPPA', NOW()),
  ('ROBYN', 'BLACK', 'SPECKLE', NOW()),
  ('VIKA', 'CHOCOLATE', 'VENICE', NOW()),
  ('VIKA', 'CHOC', 'VENICE', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cancelledAt = NOW();
